title: LightMons
description: Adds Cosmi's Fakemon (Amber & Chrome) to the Cobblemon mod!
body:
![Lightmons Logo](https://i.imgur.com/Dcku75G.png) ![sssss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5253b13b44fc9fe50eb0c9c3a2e7298ac496e560.png) ![sssss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5253b13b44fc9fe50eb0c9c3a2e7298ac496e560.png) This pack aims to add Fakemon from various fan-regions into the Cobblemon mod, with quality models and textures to support them. ![sssss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5253b13b44fc9fe50eb0c9c3a2e7298ac496e560.png) Currently the pack includes: - Cosmi's Amber & Chrome Dex (Artist: @Cosmi447) [Full Pokédex Link](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1QKyHrYdA3zxhYTzsHWf9spSqErzxnkynnJlO79GtJkY/edit#gid=897991747)
Implemented Fakemon From This Dex - Pachyquag - Probog - Gooajah - Diplit - Camagma - Brachatoa - Haiproto - Finwit - Dunklex - Wombit - Gnawdon - Fuzzapiller - Shagcoon - Masomoth - Poldra - Flufling - Woollea - Crawny - Cramber - Magmite - Tickiln - Fleava - Chiteon - Drakeon - Driby - Gorgoop - Calybrea - Copint - Clonaw - Bellicate - Foli-Qi - Yi-gami More will be added soon!
![sssss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5253b13b44fc9fe50eb0c9c3a2e7298ac496e560.png) While this datapack can be employed on servers, it's crucial to adhere to our policy. This datapack and its contents must not be placed behind a paywall or sold using real-world currency or monetary exchanges. If you come across a server violating these terms, please report it to us and Mojang for appropriate action.
